meta.description: CME coronal mass ejection crisis sequence — detection through recovery

phases.nominal: Hours 0-2: Green state, all systems nominal
phases.stockpiling: Hours 2-50: CME detected, pre-storm resource accumulation
phases.crisis: Hours 50-170: CME impact, reduced solar/desal, resource depletion
phases.recovery: Hours 170-216: Storm passing, gradual return to nominal
